title: erlangea plumosa
intro: Erlangea plumosa, also known as the 'Fever Plant', is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, helping to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and malaria, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Erlangea plumosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
